scripts.stats: sqlite3 panemaji.db "SELECT 'shops_active', COUNT(*) FROM shops WHERE is_active=1; SELECT 'girls_active', COUNT(*) FROM girls WHERE is_active=1; SELECT 'reviews', COUNT(*) FROM reviews; SELECT 'areas', COUNT(*) FROM areas; SELECT '画像あり girls', COUNT(*) FROM girls WHERE is_active=1 AND image_url IS NOT NULL AND image_url != ''; SELECT '嬢0 shops', COUNT(*) FROM shops s WHERE s.is_active=1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM girls g WHERE g.shop_id=s.id AND g.is_active=1);"
scripts.verify-areas: sqlite3 panemaji.db "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM areas;" | grep -q '^159$' && echo 'OK: 159 areas' || echo 'NG: areas count != 159'
